<?php namespace Aws\Handler\GuzzleV6; trigger_error(sprintf( 'Using the "%s" class is deprecated, use "%s" instead.', __NAMESPACE__ . '\GuzzleHandler', \Aws\Handler\Guzzle\GuzzleHandler::class ), E_USER_DEPRECATED); class_alias(\Aws\Handler\Guzzle\GuzzleHandler::class, __NAMESPACE__ . '\GuzzleHandler');
